name: Kovu
story: Kovu, the Spirit of Constant Flow. Kovu is not a spirit of stillness, but of transition. He represents the moment of change,like a sprout breaking through the soil or a river turning a corner. His body is captured in a fluid, reclining curve, showing that true strength lies in flexibility and the ability to adapt to the ever-changing world. Kovu is a powerful companion for your tea ceremony if you seek inspiration, growth, or a reminder that life is a beautiful, never-ending movement.

name: Mura
atmosphere: Midnight Â· Winter Forest Â· Calm
story: Mura, the Spirit of the Night Forest. Mura is a silent guardian who appears when the moon is high. On his head, he carries a small crescent moon, a symbol of light that guides him through the darkness. His body is covered with hand-carved patterns of ancient, leafless branches, making him look like a part of an old winter tree. Mura doesn't need leaves to be beautiful; he represents the deep strength of roots and the quiet peace of the cold woods. He is a perfect companion for late-night tea sessions or quiet moments of meditation. He brings a calm, grounded energy to your tea tray.

name: Solas
story: Solas, the Voice of the Embers. Part of a small circle of spirits who gather around the sacred forest fire, Solas is the one who keeps the ancient melodies alive. He sings songs that only the trees and the rising steam can truly understand. Hand-sculpted from dark, textured clay, Solas features flowing spiral engravings on his sides,symbols of sound waves and the eternal rhythm of nature. A bright mystical rune is etched on his back, acting as a tuning fork for the energy of your tea space. He is the perfect companion for those who find music in the ritual of brewing. Whether you are listening to the whistle of the kettle or the quiet pour of water, Solas stands as a reminder to find your own voice and melody in the everyday.

name: Pio
story: Pio, the Heart of the Forest Choir. The final member of the campfire circle, Pio is the embodiment of kindness and universal harmony. While others sing or dream, Pio simply is. His energy is so warm and welcoming that the forest birds treat him as their favorite resting place, perching on his shoulders and even nesting on his head. He brings a sense of gentle companionship to your tea ceremony, reminding us that when we are at peace, the whole world wants to be near us.

name: Kitsune
story: Kitsune, a mischievous nine-tailed kitsune tea pet who arrives with an unexpected companion: a tiny chicken perched on her head, as if it's the most natural crown in the world. She adores good tea (the kind that lingers on the tongue) and lives for interesting conversations, secrets, stories, bold opinions, laughter that warms the cups.

name: Pip
story: Pip, the Silent Perch. Pip is a spirit of such immense stillness and kindness that even the shiest forest birds feel safe enough to rest on him.

name: Nox
story: Nox, the Star-Sleeper. While the other spirits guard the forest, Nox is the keeper of its dreams. He only wakes when the moon is high, but for your tea ceremony he offers a quiet, grounding presence. He does not demand attention; he simply shares his calm with you.

name: Runehorn Sentinel
story: Somewhere between smoke, tea steam, and old forest silence, the Runehorn Sentinel keeps watch. This handmade unglazed ceramic tea pet is a small horned guardian spirit, quiet, grounded, and oddly comforting on a tea table. Its dark, matte surface and carved details feel like something found in a forgotten shrine or tucked into a wooden box of charms. Place it beside your teapot, and it becomes part of the ritual: a steady presence while the kettle sings and the world slows down.

name: Six-Eyed Spirit Bird
atmosphere: Mystical Â· Snarky Â· Modern Folklore
story: This design is inspired by modern Korean animation folklore. Bring the mischievous charm of Korean myths and art to your tea table with this handmade Magpie tea pet. Known as the snarky, six-eyed familiar, she is the perfect companion for those who like their tea with a side of mystery and a hint of demon-hunting magic. This magpie represents playful cunning and loyalty. In your tea ceremony, she acts as a Watcher of the Brew, ensuring every steep is perfect.

name: Master of the Forest
story: He arrived the way quiet things do, without an entrance, without a warning. Master of the Forest is a handmade unglazed ceramic tea pet shaped like a calm horned spirit, wearing a pale skull mask like a winter moon over dark earth. He rests low and still, as if he's been here longer than the table itself, listening to the kettle and the weather. This one isn't playful, and he isn't in a hurry. He has the kind of presence that makes a room feel calmer, a patient, watchful guardian who prefers silence to noise and meaning to small talk. Set him on your tray and he becomes part of the ritual: a steady shadow at the edge of lamplight, a companion for late sessions, rainy mornings, and conversations that don't need to be rushed. Feed him a little tea, let the warmth pass over him, and watch his surface slowly change, subtle, patient, earned.

name: Marl
story: Marl, the Beauty Collector. Marl is a flower slug with a patient eye for beauty. He slowly gathers the delicate things most creatures pass by: fallen petals, pale blossoms, soft shadows, tiny marks in stone, and the gentle shapes left by time. Do you love to collect small beautiful things, enjoy botanical details, like your tea rituals to feel personal, poetic, and a little unusual?
personality: Observant Â· Tender Â· Devoted to Beauty

name: Koda
atmosphere: Enchanted Forest Â· Earthy Â· Ancient
story: Koda The Root-Dreamer is a spirit of the deep woods who has sat in silence for centuries. He is so still and peaceful that tiny forest mushrooms have chosen him as their home. He doesn't hurry; he reminds us that growth takes time and that there is beauty in stillness.

name: Noru
story: Noru is a flying whale spirit who carries little mountains across skies. He is drawn to distant horizons, half-planned journeys, secret maps, and the feeling that somewhere out there another beautiful place is waiting to be found. He drifts to know what is waiting ahead, carrying landscapes, wishes, and unfinished dreams as if they were precious cargo. Keep him near during tea as a small companion for planning future travels, remembering places you miss, or letting your mind wander beyond the room for a while.
personality: Imaginative Â· Gentle Â· Curious Â· Far-seeing

name: Vesper
mood: Small raven of the night sky.
story: Vesper, the Night Compass. Vesper is a night raven spirit who appears when the world goes to sleep and the light begins to fade. He is observant, steady, and thoughtful, a companion for evening tea, focused moments, and times when you need to find your own direction. Keep him near your tea tray as a small reminder to slow down, look closer, and trust the small signs.
personality: Observant Â· Steady Â· Wise Â· Focused

name: Bracken
story: Bracken, the Keeper of Small Secrets. Bracken is a woodland spirit who listens more than he speaks. He knows where the old roots hide their stories, where mushrooms appear after rain, and which fern leaves are best for tucking away tiny secrets. Share your tea with him, and he will keep watch over the thoughts, wishes, and little mysteries of your tea table. You can share your own little secrets with Bracken during tea, or let him inspire fantastic and magical stories while he keeps watch over your tea table.

name: Hob
story: Hob, the Tea-Table Master Hob is a good-natured little household spirit who believes that every cup, spoon, leaf, and pause should have its proper place. He is the kind of companion who seems to know when the tea needs more time, when the table needs clearing, and when it is better to stop fussing and simply sit for a moment. He is practical, kind, and opinionated. Not in a dramatic way actually, but in the way of someone who has seen many small domestic disasters and knows exactly how they could have been avoided. Keep him near during tea as a tiny adviser for ordinary rituals, important decisions, and companionable silence. Hob feels like a small house spirit who wandered onto the tea tray and immediately decided he could turn the whole arrangement into a cozy magic ritual.
personality: Practical Â· Good-Natured Â· Helpful Â· Gently Opinionated

name: Queen of Ashes
story: She was created for light, beauty, and creation. Elegant and fragile, she loved her world and ruled it with tenderness.
But when darkness fell upon her kingdom, she did not run. Like a beautiful rose, she grew thorns of cold, forged silver. She traded her delicate rings for heavy armor and took up a two-handed sword.
She lost everything. But she will never give up, continuing to fight for her beliefs.

She is the perfect balance of fierce femininity and ruthless strength. Her dusty pink dress and fine lace are a memory of the tenderness she still holds inside. The heavy armor and sword are a promise that she will never step back.
She did not seek the war, but she will fight for all she loves. Cold. Resolute. Lethally beautiful.

profile.v: The Withered Court of the Silver Rose.
The scent of roses, the silence of the morning mist, and the cold weight of her sword.
Cowardice, broken promises, and being underestimated because of her lace.
To see her ruined, forgotten kingdom bloom again.
Forgetting the warmth of the world before she had to turn to cold steel.

name: Iron Harlequin
story: Echo of the Throne. The court always considered him a funny little freak. Aristocrats laughed at his bows, not realizing the motley cap was the perfect vantage point. He possessed a cold, piercing mind, reading others' ambitions, fears, and conspiracies like an open book.

To everyone he was a silent laughingstock, but to the Queen he was the only advisor whose words were not poisoned by flattery. Only he had the privilege of showing her the cruelest, most unvarnished truth. The blades hidden under heavy velvet were only a final argument; his primary weapon had always been his intellect.

When the kingdom turned to ash and the flatterers scattered, the masks fell away. The Queen stepped into the cinders to win back what remained of her world. And he, as before, silently slipped into her shadow.

He follows her through the ruined lands, completely calm, calculating, and invariably seeing through people. His loyalty is absolute and requires no words. And if anyone tries to betray his Queen, the final argument will be only the quiet, dull ring of metal before a perfectly precise strike.

profile.v: The Court of the Fallen Kingdom.
Silence, the absolute truth, the weight of his chains, cold steel.
Empty flattery, noisy crowds, betrayal, and bright, mindless lights.
To see the Queen's domain restored from the ash, and to see the end of all lies.
Exceptional four-armed dexterity and a gaze that reads human souls like an open book.
Failing his Queen, and becoming the mindless puppet the court once believed him to be.

name: Gentleman of the Lower City
mood: A charming thief of the gas-lit city.
story: The yellow glow of gas lamps struggles through the thick factory smog. A police whistle shrieks below, but on the wrought-iron cornice absolute calm prevails. An elegant figure in a dapper vest casually tosses a heavy coin purse. A flash of lightning reflects in his brass goggles, revealing a mocking smirk before he melts into the labyrinth of steam boilers.

In the Upper City archives his file is just wild guesses and complaints from influential aristocrats. He bears no grand titles, yet pompous lords instinctively clutch their wallets when they spot the familiar gleam of his goggles and worn leather baldric.

This fellow is a virtuoso of dark alleys and a genius of bluffing. He considers his brass prosthetic hook, a souvenir from a close call with a patrol cruiser's gears, an amusing occupational hazard. It is perfectly suited for picking complex locks, scaling drainpipes, and serving as a persuasive argument in card games.

His impeccable manners open the heaviest oak doors of high society. He robs the overly arrogant, swindles the overly confident, and escapes across rain-slicked roofs, cheerfully saluting his pursuers with his rapier. For him, every heist is high art. He leaves behind only a faint scent of machine oil, a night breeze, and absolute emptiness in their safes.
And while panic rises below, he is already perched on a clock tower spire, casually tossing a stolen gold chronometer in his good hand, looking out for his next daring target.

profile.v: High-society swindler and master of the bluff.
Extreme risks, dangerous challenges, and unpredictable adventures.
The boring, predictable life of ordinary citizens.
Can pick a safe with his brass hook while giving a polite compliment.
Never takes off his goggles.

name: The Librarian
story: The Librarian does not walk the streets of ordinary cities. This mystical creature belongs to the shifting corridors of the dreamscape, where fading thoughts turn into dust and lost knowledge thickens into mist. As worlds vanish and civilisations crumble, this silent keeper travels between realities, gathering the fragments of ancient stories and preserving the final whispers of forgotten knowledge before they disappear forever into absolute nothingness.

The Librarian is a living reminder that the most profound secrets, the ones that can truly change a soul, are never shouted. They are always hidden in the dark, waiting between the lines of an unread book.

profile.v: Unknown. The Librarian believes everyone should keep their own secrets.
Born within the surreal landscape of forgotten dreams.
Midnight silence, the wind, lavender tea, abandoned manuscripts, and the flicker of a campfire.
Empty chatter, loud unwanted advice, and those who mistreat books.
Mastering long silences, looking straight into human souls, and vanishing into thin air when least expected.
The unique ability to transform what is forgotten into what is deeply needed.
Calm, observant, and reserved. A presence that feels incredibly cozy, yet beautifully strange.

name: Master of the Forest
mood: Old god of the city's edges.
story: He used to belong to the deep woods. These days his territory is broader and far less romantic: vacant lots behind supermarkets, overgrown railway embankments, courtyards between apartment blocks, abandoned construction sites, and cracks in the asphalt where green things still insist on coming back.

He watches the concrete jungle take more and more ground with a philosophical kind of amusement. The city may act like it has already won, but he is patient enough to know better. In the long run, he is certain, Nature will reclaim what is hers.

He has his own way of dealing with people, too. For the arrogant ones, the route home may suddenly become oddly unhelpful: a wrong turn here, a familiar yard that somehow feels unfamiliar there. But for someone truly looking for a way out, the right path has a habit of appearing sooner than expected.

He remembers the old world perfectly well, but he learned to live in the new one. He is curious about modern life, studies its strange inventions and habits, drinks herbal blends, appreciates a good espresso, and keeps a close eye on every small living creature that still survives among concrete and noise.

If people believe a species has disappeared, that does not necessarily mean it is gone. There is every chance the Master of the Forest has already hidden the last survivors somewhere safe, far from people and their endless plans.

profile.v: An old keeper of wild places who adapted to the modern city without becoming part of it.
Vacant lots, overgrown rail lines, courtyards, abandoned sites, and the edges of places people stopped noticing.
Calm, stubborn, curious, and quietly amused.
Sunsets, herbal blends, good espresso, rare species, and all kinds of living creatures.
Waste, cruelty, pointless noise, and people who see life as disposable.
Nature always comes back.
Vegetarian. Eco-activist. On the side of the living.
Creating hidden sanctuaries for endangered species.
He may interrupt any conversation to rescue a beetle, move a snail off the pavement, or inspect a strange seed.

name: The Dreamer
story: He steps out when the city finally goes to sleep and the neon lights blur in the rain puddles. To the rest of the world he is just a silent shadow in a hoodie, headphones glued to his ears. But where others see only cold, blank concrete walls, he sees a canvas.

His art is a quiet conversation with the city. The hiss of his spray can is a secret language, telling stories on brick walls while lo-fi beats mix with water dripping from the roofs. By sunrise he is already high up on a rooftop, leaving his painted birds behind to remind the rushing morning crowds to stop and breathe.

v: Long, quiet walks through empty streets
Painting graffiti when the city is asleep
Lo-fi music mixed with the sound of rain
Often draws birds, says they reflect him best
Feels most alive in the moments most people miss

name: The Observer
story: While the modern city screams in a blur of neon and traffic, he sits right in the middle of it, completely untouched by the noise. With his favorite plant pot safely by his side and a cup of steaming tea in his hands, this modern elf tunes into a different frequency.

Behind his calm, thoughtful eyes is a mind that reads the city's hidden rhythms. To him, the steady, hypnotic beats of psy-trance are the perfect background music for watching the clouds shift and the daylight change. He communicates through the precise, elegant strokes of his calligraphy brushes and the little conversations he shares with his plants.

v: Psy trance and deep, steady beats
Plants and green corners at home
Watching the sky, trees and changing light
Feels safe when his favorite plant pot is close

name: The Garden Snail
story: This cheerful little spirit lives where the morning dew meets the scent of wild strawberries. While the rest of the world rushes by in a blur of fast decisions, this gentle creature prefers a different pace: one measured in summer rain showers and the slow opening of flower petals.

Equipped with a tiny, naive heart and an unshakeable belief in magic, this soul keeps a watchful eye over the garden, whispering to growing seedlings and tracking the sun across the leaves. To this whimsical companion, every blooming bud is a miracle, and every quiet corner of the forest is a safe haven.

name: The Roastery Kodama
story: He is concentrated life energy, the invisible force that shakes the city out of its slumber.

Once, this forest spirit matured in the warm gloom of tropical lands, for years soaking up the juices from the roots of wild coffee groves. Since moving to the megalopolis, he has quickly found his new power spots: the fragrant, sun-warmed corners of roasting houses and specialty coffee shops.
He has become the Roastery Kodama, a spirit-resonator who sincerely adores the morning rush, the hum of industrial roasters, and the thick, intoxicating scent of a fresh grind.
A companion to early birds and midnight thinkers. He is a reminder: to truly wake up, find your voice, and embrace a new day, you must simply shed your old, outgrown shell.

profile.v: The hyperactive soulmate who never sleeps and charges everyone around him with electric energy.
Top shelves of indie bookstores, tucked inside burlap coffee sacks, or perched behind industrial roasting exhausts where the air is warmest.

v: Singing at the top of his lungs in sync with professional coffee grinders (he thinks they are performing a duet).
The scent of 100% Arabica with anaerobic fermentation.
Instant 3-in-1 coffee (he considers it a personal insult and a crime against nature).
Left on your shelf next to a real coffee bean, he guards you against morning grogginess.
At night he secretly tweaks the grind settings on espresso machines with his gear-wheel to make the flavour woodsier. Baristas are baffled the next morning.

name: Skyline Nomad
story: He dwells where the city's concrete constraints end and the open expanse begins. The Skyline Nomad is a spirit of the heights, driven by a physical need for the wind in his face and constant motion. He shares the upper realm with the birds and balances on the edges of the abyss for the pure, intoxicating feeling of freedom.

If you have ever felt the urge to escape the suffocating noise of the streets and find peace on a high, wind-swept roof, this little nomad is your perfect companion. He is a listener for those who find comfort and freedom in the heights.

profile.v: The smell of ozone right before a thunderstorm, the vibration of subway trains echoing up through the walls, the rumble of old ventilation units.
Sitting still for too long.
Being permanently grounded, or trapped in a windowless basement.
Dropping tiny pebbles down deep ventilation shafts to listen to the echo bounce.
Hides a collection of small human things snatched under loose roof tiles.
